# Daily markdown log

| Field        | Value                    |
|-------------|--------------------------|
| Phase       | P4: Logging              |
| Priority    | Must have                |
| Status      | Not started              |
| Est. Effort | Medium (3-5h)            |
| Dependencies| Context switch protocol  |

## Description

Append to `~/taskflow/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md` on every task switch.

## Log fields

- Timestamp
- Task name
- Template used
- Exit bookmark
- Duration

Store locally.
